LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.description: An 老旧, destroyed military truck. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Truck.label: 战前美国陆军卡车
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.description: An 老旧, destroyed military Vertibid. Used by the great nations before the bombs droped.
LanguageData.FCP_Pre_War_Army_Vertibird.label: 战前美国陆军飞鸟
